hero:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1080 360" role="img" aria-label="Cross-section of a cannabis canopy showing photosynthetic light falling off with depth, and under-canopy bars adding red light at the base.">
        <defs>
          <linearGradient id="ray" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
            <stop offset="0" stop-color="#FFE7A8" stop-opacity="0.9"/>
            <stop offset="1" stop-color="#FFE7A8" stop-opacity="0"/>
          </linearGradient>
          <linearGradient id="redglow" x1="0" y1="1" x2="0" y2="0">
            <stop offset="0" stop-color="#FF4365" stop-opacity="0.85"/>
            <stop offset="1" stop-color="#FF4365" stop-opacity="0"/>
          </linearGradient>
          <radialGradient id="bulb" cx="0.5" cy="0.5" r="0.5">
            <stop offset="0" stop-color="#FF6F86"/>
            <stop offset="1" stop-color="#C2123F"/>
          </radialGradient>
        </defs>

        <!-- top light rays -->
        <g opacity="0.55">
          <rect x="120" y="0" width="36" height="150" fill="url(#ray)"/>
          <rect x="300" y="0" width="36" height="150" fill="url(#ray)"/>
          <rect x="480" y="0" width="36" height="150" fill="url(#ray)"/>
          <rect x="660" y="0" width="36" height="150" fill="url(#ray)"/>
          <rect x="840" y="0" width="36" height="150" fill="url(#ray)"/>
        </g>

        <!-- depth bands + PPFD labels -->
        <g font-family="JetBrains Mono, monospace" font-size="13" fill="#8FA096">
          <line x1="40" y1="92" x2="1040" y2="92" stroke="#2C3A33" stroke-dasharray="2 5"/>
          <text x="40" y="84" fill="#FFE7A8">APICAL</text>
          <text x="930" y="84" fill="#F3F7F3" font-size="17" font-weight="700">~900 µmol</text>

          <line x1="40" y1="190" x2="1040" y2="190" stroke="#2C3A33" stroke-dasharray="2 5"/>
          <text x="40" y="182" fill="#9FB0A6">MIDDLE</text>
          <text x="930" y="182" fill="#C3CEC6" font-size="17" font-weight="700">~350 µmol</text>

          <line x1="40" y1="278" x2="1040" y2="278" stroke="#2C3A33" stroke-dasharray="2 5"/>
          <text x="40" y="270" fill="#FF7E94">BASAL</text>
          <text x="930" y="270" fill="#FF7E94" font-size="17" font-weight="700">~120 µmol</text>
        </g>

        <!-- stylised plant silhouettes -->
        <g fill="#1E2E26" stroke="#33473D" stroke-width="1.5">
          <path d="M250 300 C250 230 235 150 250 70 C262 150 268 150 250 70 C268 150 285 235 250 300Z"/>
          <path d="M250 300 C210 250 175 200 150 150 C200 195 235 235 250 290Z"/>
          <path d="M250 300 C290 250 325 200 350 150 C300 195 265 235 250 290Z"/>
          <path d="M250 300 C220 260 190 235 165 215 C210 240 240 270 250 295Z"/>
          <path d="M250 300 C280 260 310 235 335 215 C290 240 260 270 250 295Z"/>
        </g>
        <g fill="#1E2E26" stroke="#33473D" stroke-width="1.5">
          <path d="M620 300 C620 230 605 150 620 70 C638 150 655 235 620 300Z"/>
          <path d="M620 300 C580 250 545 200 520 150 C570 195 605 235 620 290Z"/>
          <path d="M620 300 C660 250 695 200 720 150 C670 195 635 235 620 290Z"/>
          <path d="M620 300 C590 260 560 235 535 215 C580 240 610 270 620 295Z"/>
          <path d="M620 300 C650 260 680 235 705 215 C660 240 630 270 620 295Z"/>
        </g>

        <!-- floor -->
        <rect x="0" y="300" width="1080" height="60" fill="#0A100D"/>
        <!-- under-canopy red glow -->
        <rect x="40" y="250" width="1000" height="52" fill="url(#redglow)" opacity="0.5"/>
        <!-- under-canopy bars -->
        <g>
          <rect x="120" y="304" width="200" height="9" rx="3" fill="url(#bulb)"/>
          <rect x="430" y="304" width="200" height="9" rx="3" fill="url(#bulb)"/>
          <rect x="740" y="304" width="200" height="9" rx="3" fill="url(#bulb)"/>
        </g>
        <text x="40" y="338" font-family="JetBrains Mono, monospace" font-size="12" fill="#FF7E94" letter-spacing="2">UNDER-CANOPY BARS — ADDING THE PHOTONS THE TOP FIXTURE CAN'T REACH</text>
      </svg>
mount:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1080 300" role="img" aria-label="Side-by-side comparison of subcanopy bench mounting versus inter-canopy in-branch mounting.">
        <defs>
          <radialGradient id="b2" cx="0.5" cy="0.5" r="0.6"><stop offset="0" stop-color="#FF6F86"/><stop offset="1" stop-color="#C2123F"/></radialGradient>
        </defs>
        <!-- divider -->
        <line x1="540" y1="30" x2="540" y2="270" stroke="#2C3A33" stroke-dasharray="3 6"/>
        <text x="60" y="44" font-family="Archivo, sans-serif" font-weight="700" font-size="17" fill="#F3F7F3">SCL — SUBCANOPY</text>
        <text x="600" y="44" font-family="Archivo, sans-serif" font-weight="700" font-size="17" fill="#F3F7F3">ICL — INTER-CANOPY</text>

        <!-- SCL plant -->
        <g transform="translate(0,0)">
          <ellipse cx="270" cy="120" rx="150" ry="60" fill="#1E2E26" stroke="#33473D"/>
          <rect x="266" y="150" width="8" height="100" fill="#33473D"/>
          <ellipse cx="270" cy="215" rx="70" ry="34" fill="#172420" stroke="#33473D"/>
          <!-- bench bars -->
          <rect x="150" y="255" width="100" height="8" rx="3" fill="url(#b2)"/>
          <rect x="290" y="255" width="100" height="8" rx="3" fill="url(#b2)"/>
          <g stroke="#FF4365" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0.5">
            <line x1="200" y1="252" x2="220" y2="225"/><line x1="200" y1="252" x2="180" y2="225"/>
            <line x1="340" y1="252" x2="360" y2="225"/><line x1="340" y1="252" x2="320" y2="225"/>
          </g>
        </g>
        <!-- ICL plant -->
        <g transform="translate(540,0)">
          <ellipse cx="270" cy="110" rx="150" ry="55" fill="#1E2E26" stroke="#33473D"/>
          <rect x="266" y="140" width="8" height="110" fill="#33473D"/>
          <ellipse cx="270" cy="210" rx="95" ry="42" fill="#172420" stroke="#33473D"/>
          <!-- in-canopy bars -->
          <rect x="150" y="200" width="90" height="7" rx="3" fill="url(#b2)"/>
          <rect x="300" y="200" width="90" height="7" rx="3" fill="url(#b2)"/>
          <rect x="190" y="165" width="80" height="7" rx="3" fill="url(#b2)" opacity="0.8"/>
          <rect x="290" y="165" width="80" height="7" rx="3" fill="url(#b2)" opacity="0.8"/>
          <g stroke="#FF4365" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0.45">
            <line x1="195" y1="203" x2="195" y2="225"/><line x1="345" y1="203" x2="345" y2="225"/>
          </g>
        </g>
      </svg>
